name: onemem-codex
description: OneMem for Codex - verifiable memory tools plus optional Sui/Walrus trace hooks

interface.shortDescription: Verifiable memory and trace tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Save, search, and verify portable OneMem memories through MCP. Optional lifecycle hooks can buffer Codex tool calls into verifiable Sui/Walrus traces when configured and trusted.
defaultPrompt: Search OneMem for prior context before implementing this.
